title: iLAND Workbench
description: QGIS plugin for iLAND-based ecological modeling, installation, and reproducible analysis workflows.

creators.name: Paudel, Sushil
creators.affiliation: Clark University, Forest Ecology Research Lab

notes: This plugin is an independent open-source QGIS integration layer around iLAND and is not an official distribution of the iLAND core model.
